# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: user-service
    protocol: http
    host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 8080
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    enabled: true
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Request-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - X-Forwarded-Proto:https
              - X-Gateway:kong

  - name: order-service
    protocol: http
    host: order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 8080
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    enabled: true
    routes:

        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 5000
          policy: local
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Request-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600

  - name: inventory-service
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 8080
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    enabled: true
    routes:
      - name: inventory-service-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/inventory
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 15000
          policy: local
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Request-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600

  - name: payment-service
    protocol: http
    host: payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 8080
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 3000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    enabled: true
    routes:
      - name: payment-service-route
        protocols:
          - https
        methods:
          - POST
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 10
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 2000
          policy: local
          hide_client_headers: true
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - Idempotency-Key
            - X-Request-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 5
          size_unit: megabytes

upstreams:
  - name: user-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 202
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: user-service-1.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: user-service-2.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: order-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: order-service-1.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: order-service-2.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-service-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 15
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: inventory-service-1.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-service-2.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payment-service-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: Idempotency-Key
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: payment-service-1.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: payment-service-2.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true
  - name: correlation-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-Id
      generator: uuid
      echo_downstream: true
  - name: file-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true
  - name: request-termination
    route: null
    service: null
    consumer: null
    enabled: false
    config:
      status_code: 503
      message: Service unavailable

consumers:
  - username: internal-client
    custom_id: internal-client-001
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: replace-with-secure-api-key

jwt_secrets:
  - consumer: internal-client
    algorithm: HS256
    key: internal-client-jwt
    secret: replace-with-strong-shared-secret

plugin_configurations:
  - name: global-auth
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          hide_credentials: true
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - internal

acls:
  - consumer: internal-client
    group: internal
